name: Lusha
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Lusha Does

Lusha provides contact and company data, including verified emails and direct dials, using a credit-based pricing model. Agencies get access to B2B contact data with built-in compliance for GDPR and CCPA. Lusha is widely used for fast contact enrichment and tight Chrome and LinkedIn integrations.

Lusha is best suited for SDRs and agency teams that need quick access to verified contact details and simple enrichment directly from LinkedIn or the browser, rather than full outbound sequencing or campaign management.

Source: Lusha

Key Features

  • Global contact database (285M profiles)
  • Browser extension & CRM integrations for enrichment.
  • Credit-based pricing for contact reveals.
  • Buyer intent signals to identify companies showing active buying behavior.
  • Job change alerts when decision-makers change roles.

Benefits of Lusha

  • Fast contact discovery and enrichment that helps teams quickly personalize outreach.
  • Works well with LinkedIn-led prospecting.
  • GDPR compliance for European prospecting

Pricing

Lusha works on a credit-based system and offers a free trial.

  • Pro: $29.90 to $65.90/month (250 to 550 credits)
  • Premium: $69.90 to $737.90/month (600 to 7,500 credits)

Discounts are available on annual billing.

Pros

✅High-quality contact data with strong global coverage

✅Extremely fast contact lookup with the Chrome & LinkedIn extension

✅Fast enrichment and easy CRM integration

✅Strong European data coverage

Cons

🚫Cost per contact can add up; phone data consumes credits quickly

🚫Less focused on SMB signals (more enterprise B2B)

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“What I like best about Lusha is how quickly and accurately it finds contact information for prospects. It saves a lot of time on lead research.

Sometimes the contact numbers are outdated or unavailable for certain industries, which requires cross-checking from other sources.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
